title: SMP
body:
This modpack is made for use on a vanilla Minecraft survival server. Aimed at improving performance and adding some QOL features to the default client.\
\
--------------------------------------------------\
\
The following mods are present in the modpack:\
[Fast IP Ping](https://modrinth.com/mod/fast-ip-ping)\
[ServerCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/servercore)\
[Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)\
[Packet Fixer](https://modrinth.com/mod/packet-fixer)\
[Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)\
[voxy](https://modrinth.com/mod/voxy)\
[Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)\
[Remove Reloading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/rrls)\
[YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)\
[MiniHUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/minihud)\
[Very Many Players (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/vmp-fabric)\
[Your Options Shall Be Respected (YOSBR)](https://modrinth.com/mod/yosbr)\
[Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)\
[Chat Animation [Smooth Chat]](https://modrinth.com/mod/chatanimation)\
[NoisiumForked](https://modrinth.com/mod/noisiumforked)\
[Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric)\
[LambDynamicLights - Dynamic Lights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights)\
[FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)\
[ukulib](https://modrinth.com/mod/ukulib)\
[Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra)\
[e4mc](https://modrinth.com/mod/e4mc)\
[Text Placeholder API](https://modrinth.com/mod/placeholder-api)\
[Carpet](https://modrinth.com/mod/carpet)\
[uku's Armor HUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/ukus-armor-hud)\
[BadOptimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/badoptimizations)\
[ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast)\
[Searchables](https://modrinth.com/mod/searchables)\
[Tweakeroo](https://modrinth.com/mod/tweakeroo)\
[More Chat History](https://modrinth.com/mod/morechathistory)\
[Forge Config API Port](https://modrinth.com/mod/forge-config-api-port)\
[Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby)\
[[EMF] Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)\
[Alternate Current](https://modrinth.com/mod/alternate-current)\
[MaLiLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/malilib)\
[Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)\
[Auth Me](https://modrinth.com/mod/auth-me)\
[spark](https://modrinth.com/mod/spark)\
[More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling)\
[No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports)\
[Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-chat)\
[Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options)\
[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)\
[Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)\
[Controlling](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlling)\
[Gamma Utils (Fullbright)](https://modrinth.com/mod/gamma-utils)\
[[ETF] Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)\
[Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)\
[Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)\
[Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify)\
[Capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/capes)\
[ScalableLux](https://modrinth.com/mod/scalablelux)\
\
--------------------------------------------------\
\
This modpack enhances the vanilla Minecraft experience through performance optimizations and quality-of-life improvements while maintaining full compatibility with vanilla servers.
